clusters.justification: These terms share macroscopic co-activation profiles across paralimbic and salience circuitry dedicated to the generation, representation, and physiological arousal of positively and negatively valenced states.
These concepts map onto mesolimbic and orbitofrontal circuitry responsible for computing subjective utility, processing incentives, and driving goal-directed behavior.

These terms consistently co-activate within the default mode core, subserving internally-directed attention required for abstract self-referential processing and interpreting the mental states of others.
